name: Khenra Features
summary: Ability Score Increase.Your Dexterity score increases by 2, and your Strength score increases by 1.
bonuses: Ability Score Increase.Your Dexterity score increases by 2, and your Strength score increases by 1.

Age.Khenra mature quickly, reaching adulthood in their early teens. Khenra initiates are usually the youngest in a crop, completing the trials by their late teens. Even without a violent death, they rarely live past 60.
Alignment.Most khenra lean toward chaotic alignments. They have no particular inclination toward good or evil.
Size.Khenra have similar builds to humans. Your size is Medium.
Speed.Your base walking speed is 35 feet.

traits.name: Age
traits.summary: Khenra mature quickly, reaching adulthood in their early teens. Khenra initiates are usually the youngest in a crop, completing the trials by their late teens. Even without a violent death, they rarely live past 60.

traits.name: Alignment
traits.summary: Most khenra lean toward chaotic alignments. They have no particular inclination toward good or evil.

traits.name: Khenra Weapon Training
traits.summary: You have proficiency with the khopesh, spear, and javelin.

traits.name: Khenra Twins
traits.summary: If your twin is alive and you can see your twin, whenever you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. If your twin is dead (or if you were born without a twin), you can’t be frightened.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Dexterity score increases by 2, and your Strength score increases by 1.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Khenra have similar builds to humans. Your size is Medium.

stats.label: Speed
stats.value: Your base walking speed is 35 feet.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common and Khenra.
